samples.gvd:
module right_shifter(
    input clk,
    input d,
    output reg [7:0] q
); 
    initial q = 0;  // Initialize q to 0
    
    always @(posedge clk) begin
        q <= (q >> 1);  // Right shift q by 1 bit
        q[7] <= d;  // Insert new input bit d into the most significant position of the register
    end
endmodule
samples.xml_description:
<module id="right_shifter">
    <description>Implement a right shifter.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock.</input>
        <input id="d">Input signal to be right-shifted.</input>
        <output id="q" width_description="[7:0]">Output signal representing the result of the right shift operation.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <param id="width" value="8">Width of the input and output signals.</param>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description>
        <sequential_logic>
            <reg id="q" type="state" width_description="[width-1:0]">Register to store the right-shifted value.</reg>
            <always>
                <trigger>clk</trigger>
                <statement>q <= (q >> 1);</statement>
            </always>
            <initial>
                <statement>q = 0;</statement>
            </initial>
        </sequential_logic>
        <sequential_logic>
            <trigger>clk</trigger>
            <statement>q[7] <= d;</statement>
        </sequential_logic>
    </logic_description>
    <task>
        <description>Implement a right shifter.</description>
        <trigger>clk</trigger>
        <activity>
            <statement>Shift the contents of the q register to the right by one bit.</statement>
            <statement>Insert the new input bit d into the most significant position of the register.</statement>
        </activity>
    </task>
</module>
